data.raceComments: {"comment":"A 3YO Handicap with a QTIS bonus attached is run over 2020m for 85K, and the last start Hawkesbury winner 2. FALCON LAIR is the one we side with. He has joined the Queensland arm of the Archibald stable, and he has drawn to receive the run of the race early on. He is getting stronger with each start, and with Ryan Maloney in the saddle, he is ready to repeat. 4. GO MARO has raced his way into full fitness and some good form lately, following up his Kilcoy win with a pair of narrow defeats. He can settle a touch closer than usual from a superior gate, and another honest effort is expected. 1. WORTHY ENUFF has won all of his 3 starts this prep, including his penultimate start here. Stick with him. 7. CASTELLO GRANDE ran a good race for third over 1600m last start, and the extra 420m is just what he needs fourth up from a spell. Each way.","runners":[2,4,1,7],"exclusive":true}
